use_cases: Displaying user progress toward goals with animated visual feedback
Showing completion percentage for tasks or milestones
Tracking daily/weekly metrics in a dashboard widget
Presenting fitness or learning progress to end users
Highlighting savings or investment goals in fintech apps
ai_summary: An animated progress card component built with Framer Motion that displays goal completion with a smooth progress bar animation. Features a theme-adaptive design with shadow depth, rounded corners, and primary color theming. Includes configurable icon, title, progress labels, and percentage calculation. Reusable across dashboards for tracking metrics, goals, or milestones in various industries.
